sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ دِينَا حَذَاءً صَغِيرًا وَحِيدًا فِي الطَّرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Dina je pronašla jednu malu cipelu samu na putu.
sentences.translationEn: Dina found a small lone shoe on the road.

sentences.translation: Cipela je bila lijepa i nova.
sentences.translationEn: The shoe was beautiful and new.

sentences.translation: Dina ga je uzela i tražila njegovog vlasnika.
sentences.translationEn: Dina took it and looked for its owner.

sentences.arabic: رَأَتْ طِفْلًا صَغِيرًا يَبْكِي عِنْدَ الْبَقَالَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vidjela je malo dijete koje plače kod prodavnice.
sentences.translationEn: She saw a small child crying near the grocery shop.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ الطِّفْلُ جِدًّا حِينَ أَعَادَتْ لَهُ دِينَا حَذَاءَهُ.
sentences.translation: Dijete se veoma obradovalo kada mu je Dina vratila cipelu.
sentences.translationEn: The child was very happy when Dina returned his shoe to him.
